summary_en: Simplified share exchange: OK Web to acquire JINEN Corp. as 100% subsidiary effective 2026-06-30. No cash consideration or share price disclosed in excerpt. JINEN founded June 2023; provides community formation consulting, management support, and AI monitoring for 50+ corporate and municipal clients. Strategic rationale: integrate JINEN's community design and operations expertise with OK Web's OKWAVE platform data and GRATICA SaaS service to build end-to-end shared-creation community design, operation, analysis and monetization offering.
title_en: Notice Regarding Full Subsidiary Status of JINEN Corp. via Simplified Share Exchange for Growth Acceleration of Co-Creation Community Business
translation_en_brief:
OK Web announced on 14 May 2026 that its board approved a simplified share exchange under the Companies Act Article 796(2) whereby OK Web becomes the parent company and JINEN Corp. becomes its 100% subsidiary. The transaction was approved by JINEN's extraordinary shareholders' meeting on the announcement date and is scheduled to take effect on 30 June 2026. No shareholder approval is required from OK Web under simplified-exchange rules.

JINEN, founded in June 2023, provides community formation consulting, management support, and AI-powered tools to over 50 corporate and municipal clients. The company's proprietary assets include a 16-quadrant community classification framework validated by Tokyo University research, an AI monitoring tool called Yuinote, and extensive case-study data.

OK Web stated the strategic rationale as integrating JINEN's community design and operations expertise with OK Web's OKWAVE Q&A platform (accumulated 48 million questions/answers since 1999) and GRATICA SaaS service (which tracks gratitude and engagement data). The combination is intended to create an end-to-end service offering for shared-creation community design, operation, analysis, and monetization, shifting JINEN's revenue model from spot consulting to recurring SaaS subscriptions. The excerpt does not disclose the exchange ratio, share count, or cash consideration.
